titulo: ⚽ Top 8 Teams Dominating the 2026 World Cup
subtitulo: Surprising stats and unexpected contenders shaking up the knockout race

items.descripcion: Messi’s vision and Haaland’s firepower combine for unstoppable attack.
Neymar’s trickery and a lethal defense keep them firing on all cylinders.
Young talent and veteran composure drive Les Bleus forward.
A balanced squad with lethal set‑pieces and defensive solidity.
Tiki‑takas revival and sharp forwards keep Spain in contention.
A rugged defense and pace on the break propel the Three Lions.
Frenkie’s vision and Dutch press create endless chances.
Ronaldo’s experience and young stars spark Portugal’s late surge.

dato_extra: Brasil is the only team to score over 3 goals in every match so far.
